case_title: BANK OF AMERICA VS. PENDELTON JOHNSON et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, PENDELTON DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-06-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-04-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-22-2008
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $230.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, PENDELTON
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-06-2008, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA SERVED MAR-06-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, PENDELTON
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF ERICA L. BRACHFELD RE: CALCULATION OF INTEREST & ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 B (1) & (2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, PENDELTON $2,135.68 PRINCIPAL, $175.54 INTEREST, $230.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,541.22, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
